resources.string: Share a fresh photo with your TV.
Use the phone as the camera. Open the local link on the TV browser, then capture whenever you want the TV view to update.
Frame the shot here before sending the latest capture to the TV viewer.
First test this URL from a laptop/phone browser on the same Wi-Fi. Then open it in the Samsung TV browser.
Ready. Tap Capture to send the latest photo to TV.
Server failed to start. Port 8080 may be blocked or already in use.
Camera permission is required to capture photos.
Cannot access camera. Check permission or close another camera app.
Camera ready. Tap Capture to send a photo.
TV browser URL\nConnect this phone to Wi-Fi to generate the link.
Photo captured. TV viewer will refresh automatically.
Photo captured, but latest.jpg could not be saved.
Camera permission denied. Enable it from Android app settings.
